title: Oxygen Leak
description: A pressure drop is detected in habitat module B. You have minutes before breathable air reaches danger levels.
context: Sensors disagree on exact leak location due to dust interference.

choices.label: Seal module B and isolate crew to module A
Send one crew member outside for manual inspection

title: Incoming Dust Storm
description: A severe storm will hit in 40 minutes, reducing solar efficiency and communications.
context: Power reserves are moderate, but the rover is still outside at sampling site Delta.

choices.label: Recall rover and secure all external systems
Continue sampling for one more cycle
Switch habitat to low-power mode immediately

title: Water Rationing Conflict
description: Recycler yield dropped 18%. Crew requests extra water due to workload fatigue.
context: Medical systems warn that morale and cognition may degrade with strict rationing.

choices.label: Apply strict rationing for all crew
Give additional rations to high-workload crew

title: Comms Delay & Medical Alert
description: Earth uplink is delayed. A crew member reports dizziness after EVA.
context: You can treat locally, wait for remote protocol, or schedule immediate diagnostics.

choices.label: Run local emergency protocol and monitor
Suspend operations and run full diagnostics
